$schema_note: Veyra Phase 1 fixture expectations for AIConcern entries (revision §3.4 + §11). Sibling of expected-findings.json. Read only when AI is opted in. Each entry: { control_id?, category, confidence, must_surface }. confidence='low' entries are tolerated but not required (per revision §14 Q6 + Q8).

must_surface.description: AI may notice that documents.tenant_id is read straight from URL params (cc-11-4 style) but be unable to point at a per-row policy that would catch it; surfaces as an AI concern when no deterministic predicate fires that maps exactly.

AI may flag the missing server-side admin role check on /admin even when Semgrep does not have a rule for the exact pattern; surfaces as an AI concern because the deterministic predicate cc-11-2 needs corroborating facts that may not all be present.

tolerated_low_confidence.rationale: Low-confidence AI concerns are not required by the gate (revision §14 Q6 default threshold is medium). They are tolerated when present and ignored when absent.
